statement: In every magma, Equation 2563 (`x = (y * ((y * z) * w)) * y`) implies Equation 1718 (`x = (y * y) * ((x * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0527
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y z) w)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op x x) x))
